title: Kaworu and Seele Tangent
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu and Seele (Tangent)             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat May 03, 2008 5:42 pm (Tangent split out of this thread ) Still, would having Adam's soul mean that he would have knowledge of what he had created? It seems to me as though Rei understands her bond with other people (my connections, etc), but not much more. I guess if Kaworu was more self aware, he would understand what he had done, but why would he impart such information to SEELE?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat May 03, 2008 5:50 pm I always got the feeling they tried to cut a deal with him and he was playing them to get a chance to undo all the damage they had done. However he had a change of heart at the very end and let Shinji win.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat May 03, 2008 6:08 pm Well, at the end, didnt Kaworu realize that he had been tricked by SEELE? So it isnt so much that he changed his mind, more that he didnt want SEELE to pursue their own scenario?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 03, 2008 6:56 pm He didn't want them to pursue their Scenario which is part of the reason he let Shinji kill him, yes. In terms of Kaworu being "tricked", personally I never got that sense in watching the series.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat May 03, 2008 7:20 pm Well, I think he expected it to happen, but he still did say "wait...this isnt adam" which seemed like surprise to me...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat May 03, 2008 7:46 pm Well I also got the feeling they were trying to play him too. I doubt either side was truely honest with the other.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 04, 2008 1:28 am DANGER! DANGER! THREAD DERAILMENT SIGHTED!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun May 04, 2008 1:41 am Switched the tracks in time. Ladies and gentlemen, the train is safe. You may return to your regularly scheduled discussion.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 04, 2008 4:19 am sadsadshinji wrote: Well, at the end, didnt Kaworu realize that he had been tricked by SEELE? So it isnt so much that he changed his mind, more that he didnt want SEELE to pursue their own scenario?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun May 04, 2008 6:56 am Resurrection Theory? Like when EVA00 sprouts the Angel tower?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 04, 2008 6:59 am sadsadshinji wrote: Resurrection Theory? Like when EVA00 sprouts the Angel tower?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun May 04, 2008 7:11 am That is to say he sought to resurrect all the Angels through 3I? I suppose if he was the progenitor, it is possible that he does control where the souls go, so it wouldnt be surprising if he was planning such a move. At the same time, Kaworu seems sincerely motivated by love of Shinji (or whatever you want to call it) when he sacrifices himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun May 04, 2008 7:17 am I, for one, think it is quite far fetched. 3I and Eva-01 stuff I mean. If it was true there would be some implication for it As for the Resurrection Theory otherwise...Well, I have not made my mind yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 04, 2008 7:39 am Xard wrote: I, for one, think it is quite far fetched. 3I and Eva-01 stuff I mean. If it was true there would be some implication for it
